seoTitle: Wangandary vs Wangaratta — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wangandary and Wangaratta. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wangandary and Wangaratta.
heading: Wangandary vs Wangaratta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wangandary, Victoria and Wangaratta, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wangandary has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Wangaratta (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wangandary or Wangaratta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wangandary has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Wangaratta scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wangandary scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Wangaratta scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wangandary or Wangaratta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wangandary has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
